I'm thinking of luxury fashion conglomerates that own multiple brands. I'm recalling that LVMH (Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton) is a large luxury goods conglomerate that owns several high-end fashion brands. I'm thinking of a specific brand within LVMH that Heidi Mount might have appeared in campaigns for. I'm considering the possibility that the brand might be Dior, as LVMH owns Dior. I'm recalling that Dior is a luxury fashion brand known for its high-end clothing and accessories. I'm thinking that Heidi Mount might have appeared in a Dior campaign. I'm trying to confirm this by thinking of other brands within LVMH that Heidi Mount might have worked with. I'm thinking of Givenchy, but I'm not sure if she has appeared in a Givenchy campaign. I'm going to go with the most likely option, which is Dior. </think>
<answer> Dior </answer>
